name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Toto
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a Toto infrared remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Command
config_entries.description: The 1-byte Toto command code to send. Range is 0 to 0xFF.

config_entries.label: Rc Code 1
config_entries.description: The first 4-bit Toto code (usually a command parameter) to send. Range is 0 to 0xF.

config_entries.label: Rc Code 2
config_entries.description: The second 4-bit Toto code (usually a command parameter) to send. Range is 0 to 0xF.
